title: Manual Debug impl for CompiledScript is correct
description: CompiledScript has a manual Debug impl (lib.rs lines 40-50) that renders the regex_cache as '<N compiled patterns>' rather than exposing regex internals. fancy_regex::Regex does not implement Debug, so a derived impl would fail to compile. The manual impl gives callers useful diagnostic output without coupling the public debug representation to internal regex objects. A reviewer might suggest removing Debug entirely or adding the derive macro, but the manual impl is the correct solution: it compiles, it is informative, and it does not expose implementation details.
